name: Slim Red and Green Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fresh bell peppers in a 10- by 15-inch pan.
2. Broil about 3 inches below heat, turning until skins are blackened all over, 15 to 17 minutes. Let cool, then pull off skins, remove stems, and rinse seeds. (Drain and seed canned peppers.)
3. Finely chop peppers in a food processor or with a knife.
4. Place chopped peppers in a 3- to 4-quart pan over medium-high heat with onions, garbanzos, basil, tarragon, and capers; stir often until steaming, 5 to 7 minutes.
5. Fill a 5- to 6-quart pan 3/4 full of water; cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
6. Add pasta and cook, uncovered, until barely tender to bite, 7 to 8 minutes. Drain pasta and pour into a wide, shallow bowl.
7. Spoon the pepper mixture onto the pasta.
8. Mix well and season to taste with salt and pepper.
